query: INSERT INTO podcast_shows (title, slug, subtitle, description, host_persona, host_name, theme_color, schedule_day, schedule_time, schedule_timezone, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('SQUADD Podcast', 'squadd-podcast', 'Sisters Questing Unapologetically After Divine Destiny', 'The official voice of the SQUADD Coalition — seven women united in the fight for elder justice, civil rights, economic sovereignty, and community healing.', 'valanna', 'Tyanna (Ty) Battle', '#9333ea', 'Monday & Thursday', '7:00 PM', 'CT', 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000);
